title: adenanthera scandens
intro: Adenanthera scandens, also known as the coral tree or coral vine, is a tropical climbing plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Adenanthera scandens include its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Adenanthera scandens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
